close_reason: E2E test added, tw has default rules for go/cargo/uv
description:
Test scenario: Developers use native tools, Buck2 stays in sync

1. Start with working turnkey project
2. Add new dependency using native tool:
   - Go: 'go get github.com/some/pkg'
   - Python: 'uv add requests'
   - Rust: 'cargo add serde'
3. Trigger direnv reload
4. Verify deps files auto-updated
5. Verify 'tk build' still works with new dep
6. Modify source to use new dep, rebuild

Validates: bi-directional sync, no lock-in to Buck2 workflows
title: E2E: Language-native tools stay in sync
